title: Workout Power Pump
summary: Aggressive 140 BPM hybrid trap-rock  -  808 sub-bass, distorted guitars, peak-set energy.
prompt: A high-energy workout instrumental at 140 BPM. Hard-hitting trap-style 808 sub-bass, aggressive snare and clap pattern, distorted electric guitar power chords, pulsing arpeggiated synth lead, occasional vocal-chop hype shouts. Driving, relentless, peak-pump-set energy. Strong drop every 16 bars to keep momentum.
